name: Obfuscated PowerShell with Encoding
description: Detects PowerShell commands using encoding and string manipulation for obfuscation
query:
// Detect PowerShell encoding/obfuscation techniques
// Trigger on -Encoded, char arrays, or string formatting tricks
events from edr_process
where exe_path matches "(?i)powershell\.exe$"
  and cmdline matches "(?i)(-enc\s|\[char\]|replace|invoke-expression|iex\s|\-join)"
  and cmdline matches "(?i)(\[char\].*\[char\]|\-f\s*'|\-replace.*\-replace)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
